title: salix subopposita
intro: Salix subopposita, also known as Chinese weeping willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the willow family (Salicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high salicin content. The health benefits of Salix subopposita include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Salix subopposita can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for medicinal use, as well as being used in the form of poultices or salves to apply directly to the skin.
